content.en:
It's just a river basin, and Ye Tian can't deal with it, how can he abandon the end of the realm!

Of course, he also knew the Boundless Lord's concerns, because the Unbounded Lord was just an ordinary Triple Primordial Ancestor, and the river basin was too dangerous for him.

Moreover, the Lord of the Unbounded is an ontology and does not dare to take risks.

If he dared to take the risk, he would not have dared to enter the treasure land that gave birth to the Nine Extremes Golden Lotus.

"Lord of the Endless, the watershed is no joke, the dangers of the watershed are strong and weak, but none of them can be dealt with!" the Lord of the Boundless tried to persuade.

Ye Tian shook his head, "Lord of the Unbounded, I have a way to deal with a river basin, and the river basin also has an organic advantage, I will not give up." I know your worries, you think the watershed is terrible, but I'm not afraid, my strength has reached a level you can't imagine!"

"Your strength?"

The Lord of the Boundless is confused, haven't you just broken through to the Triple Origin Ancestor for a long time, what strength do you have?

At this moment, Ye Tian no longer concealed his aura.

Rumble!!!

The aura of the peak of the Triple Ancestor was exposed, making the Unbounded Lord shiver.

"The cultivation of the peak of the Triple Primordial Ancestor!"

The Lord of the Boundless is very clear about how many resources he has to consume if he wants to raise his cultivation to the limit of the Triple Ancestor, he has practiced for countless years, and he doesn't know how many resources he has refined, and he is still only at the peak of the middle stage of the Triple Ancestor, and he has not yet stepped into the late stage of the Triple Ancestor!

As a result, Ye Tian had now stepped into the peak of the Triple Ancestor.

"The Lord of Endless, even if it is the peak of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, there is still nothing he can do about it!" said the Lord of the Boundless.

At this time, Ye Tian's body was filled with an aura of extreme extremes.

Of course, Ye Tian only showed seventy-two extreme aura.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Will's Pagoda appeared, and the aura of sixty-nine Extreme Extremes permeated from the Will's Pagoda, which meant that Ye Tian had already engraved sixty-nine Extreme Extremes.

"What, Endless Lord, you have comprehended seventy-two extreme extreme paths, and you have also engraved sixty-nine extreme extreme paths on the Pagoda of Will? How did you do it, and sixty-nine extreme extreme paths, there must be sixty-nine kinds of inscription techniques, and the value of each inscription technique is unimaginable! No, you have joined the forces of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and obtained a systematic !!! of inscription techniques" The Unbounded Lord reacted.

Ye Tian nodded and said, "Yes, I have already joined the Fourfold Heavenly Gate Void Heavenly Gate, and the next time the Fivefold Holy Gate Void Tooth Holy Gate recruits members, I can directly enter the Void Tooth Holy Gate." Moreover, I have also created the Primordial Mastery Technique, and my strength is already in the ranks of the top Triple Primordial Ancestors of the High Origin Domain!"

"Lord of Endless, I didn't expect you to grow to such an extent, this is a demon!

The Unbounded Lord was shocked and envious at the same time.

At this moment, his strength is simply not a level compared to Ye Tian!

He went to a middle primordial realm, mixed for countless years, and barely reached the realm of the Triple Primordial Ancestor, and then went to the Shangling Primordial Ancestor, mixed for countless years, before he grew to the current level, and the forces he joined could only be said to be small forces, and the big forces didn't want him at all.

And the small forces don't have a systematic inscription technique at all, which doesn't help him much.

Now, as soon as Ye Tian entered the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, he joined the Quadruple Heavenly Gate as an outsider, and he could even enter the Fivefold Holy Gate, which really made him jealous.

"Lord of the Unbounded, I'll go and take out the river basin to investigate the situation first, if I can deal with it, I don't need to withdraw!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The Lord of the Unbounded answers.

Immediately, he returned to the end of the realm and informed the Lord of the Golden Body, the Lord of the White Night, and the Lord of Destruction of the situation.

......

Extreme True River.

"The Lord of the Unbounded, the Lord of the Infinite is even more powerful than you now?"

The Lord of the White Night was shocked.

It's really that Ye Tian is too low-key, and after becoming the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, he retreats and cultivates penance.

According to the words of the Unbounded Lord, even if Ye Tian broke through and comprehended the Extreme Dao, he was only a Primordial Ancestor, they were also a Primordial Ancestor, and they were also a Primordial Ancestor Peak Realm.

Even if Ye Tian comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Dao, as long as he had resources, he would soon be able to become a Dual Ancestor.

However, the gap between the Dual Origin Ancestor and the Triple Origin Ancestor is too big, and the difficulty is also very great.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian not only became a Triple Ancestor, but also hoped to solve the river basin that even the Unbounded Lord couldn't solve.

Listen to the meaning of the Lord of the Boundary, the Lord of Endless is already the first ancestor of the End of the World!

"He's better than me!" sighed the Unbounded Lord, "he can crush me with one finger now!"

Crushing the Unbounded Lord with one finger?

Lords of the White Night, they can't believe it!

The Lord of the Boundless said, "You have to be prepared with both hands, if the Lord of Endless is really unable to solve the danger of the river basin, I will take you away as soon as possible." "

"Is the watershed really that dangerous?"

The Lord of the White Night asked.

He really doesn't want to leave, this is his home, and he really wants to leave, there is absolutely no way to take all the cultivators away, countless cultivators have to fall!

"It's really extremely dangerous, even if it's me, I'll be killed in an instant!" The Unbounded Lord sighed, "I once saw a video of a lower primordial realm encountering a river basin, and that lower primordial realm was even stronger than us. As a result, the moment it interconnected with the river basin, a dense array of primordial black beasts appeared, and there were thousands of primordial black beasts comparable to me, and that low-level primordial domain was destroyed in an instant. All the cultivators didn't even have any hope of escaping, and even the original ancestors didn't have time to escape, so they were killed directly. Therefore, if you can't solve the danger of the river basin, you should go ahead of time, otherwise you will not be able to escape when the day of interconnection comes. "The Unbounded Lord's Way.

"Let's hope the Lord of Infinity can solve the danger of the watershed!"

The Lord of the Golden Body, they looked forward to it.

......

"Basin, I didn't expect such good luck!"

Ye Tian was very happy.

He had just inquired about the river basin at the Voidless Heaven Gate, and the river basin that terrified the Lord of the Boundary, in the eyes of the real powerhouse, it was a great opportunity!

Basically, there are many treasures containing extreme extremes in every river basin, and the resources are incomparably abundant.

Moreover, the basin also talks about the practice of a kind of holy art, the glazed holy cover, which is one of the holy arts found in many fourfold heavenly gates or fivefold holy gates.

The glazed holy cover belongs to one of the holy arts, and it involves the thirty-three extreme extreme paths, if you comprehend the corresponding thirty-three extreme extreme paths, and then obtain the river basin, and incorporate the entire river basin into the body, you can cultivate into the glass holy cover.

Once it has been trained into the Glass Sacred Cover, its defensive ability is enough to withstand the blows of the top four ancestors, and its life-saving ability skyrockets.

Any holy technique in the Upper Spirit Sacred Domain, the cultivation conditions are extremely harsh, even many Quadruple Primordial Ancestors cannot practice a Sacred Technique, only that very powerful Quadruple Primordial Ancestor can hope to practice a holy art.

And among the Triple Ancestors, the existence of cultivating holy arts is even rarer.

To a certain extent, the holy art is much more powerful than the original control technique, but the holy art cannot be maintained for a long time, and it has nothing to do with cultivation, his power is fixed.

In other words, when the strength reaches a certain level, the holy art is useless, but the primordial control technique is useful.

To put it simply, the holy art is a side secret technique, which temporarily makes the strength very strong, not the orthodox path.

But even so, for the Triple Ancestor or the ordinary Quadruple Ancestor, the power of the Holy Arts is too powerful!

For example, if a Triple Origin Ancestor has mastered the Glass Holy Cover, before the Holy Magic Power is exhausted, the Fourfold Origin Ancestor will not be able to kill the Triple Ancestor, and can only wait until the opponent's Holy Art Power is exhausted.
